HomeBlogServicesWriting ContestSupport UsContact
AR

/ Writing_Contest

A contest to encourage writers to create topics about free and open-source software, enriching Arabic content.

Total prizes up to $250+ USD
The writing contest is currently looking for a new sponsor.

/ How_to_Participate

01

Publish Your Topic

Post a topic about free software that meets the contest criteria on the Aosus community forum.

02

Winner Selection

At the end of each month, the oversight committee selects the winning articles.

03

Announce Winners

Winners are announced on the official Aosus community blog.

04

Content Republished

Winning articles are republished on the GnulinuxSA blog with author attribution.

/ Rules

  • >Topic must relate to free and open-source software.
  • >Topic must be exclusive to the contest and not copied or published elsewhere.
  • >Topic must include sufficient detail without needing external sources.
  • >Sources must be cited at the end of the topic if applicable.
  • >Topic license follows Aosus community license: CC-BY-SA 4.0.
  • >Republishing elsewhere is prohibited for at least 90 days after winning.
  • >5 topics are selected each month.

/ Prize_Collection

Aosus uses Open Collective for all financial matters, providing high financial transparency. PayPal and bank transfers are supported.

Open Collective →
